g.text: CollisionBuilder is the low-level collision descriptor factory.
- create live Rapier objects through ZylemWorld
- store the resulting body/collider refs on the entity
1. Physics step runs in the world
- selector matching + cooldown/phase logic decide delivery
receive intersection and post-collision events directly
- useful for stateful sensors and zone-style entities
GameEntity is the common collision consumer.
It can participate in collision handling by:
ZylemZone is the clearest example of the delegate path.
It behaves more like a stateful sensor than a simple
one-shot callback target, so it implements
CollisionBuilder creates body/collider descriptors and filter policy
StageEntityDelegate attaches entity physics into ZylemWorld
